case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. KINTUNG MA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MA, KINTUNG $3,601.34 PRINCIPAL, $718.34 INTEREST, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,568.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MA, KINTUNG
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MA, KINTUNG DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2013
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF REDUCED FILING FEES PURSUANT TO CAL. BUS. & PROF. CODE 6322.1(C)(1) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED AUG-13-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MA, KINTUNG
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MA, KINTUNG
